project.name: RAGFlow
project.stack: Flask backend, React/TypeScript frontend (UmiJS, Ant Design), Docker Compose, MySQL, Elasticsearch/Infinity, Redis, MinIO

completed: Fixed Docker TTY/stdin issue: added stdin_open/tty to docker-compose.yml and docker-compose-macos.yml
Switched docker-compose-macos.yml from build-from-source to pre-built image (infiniflow/ragflow:v0.24.0)
Remapped macOS ports 80→8080, 443→8443 to avoid conflict with macOS httpd
Created agent/tools/brave.py — Brave Search API tool, auto-registered via module discovery
Removed docker/.env from git tracking to prevent secret commits
Deleted junk artifact files from docker/
Committed and pushed to https://github.com/mr2magic/ragflow (new fork)
Installed deft: created PROJECT.md for RAGFlow
